labels.note: InputSystem has multiple responsibilities because it selects input formats, opens files, parses taxpayer data, parses receipt data, creates domain objects, and updates the database.
labels.refactoringNote: Split TXT and XML parsing into separate parser classes. Use a common abstraction or Template Method for the shared parsing workflow, and parameterize format-specific tags to reduce duplication.

labels.note: The TXT and XML loading methods repeat the same file-opening, taxpayer construction, receipt-reading, receipt-construction, and database-update workflow with only format-specific tags differing.
labels.refactoringNote: Extract the common loading algorithm into a shared parser workflow and isolate or parameterize the TXT/XML-specific delimiters and tag extraction.
